betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Filters§f

§aRestrict which items or fluids pass through duct connections using configurable whitelist/blacklist rules!§f

§bFilters§f are attachments that block or allow specific items/fluids on a duct connection. Unlike servos (which extract), filters only restrict flow. Higher tiers add more filter slots and matching options.

§6Tiers§f:
§b• Basic§f — §e3 filter slots§f. Blacklist/Whitelist.
§b• Hardened§f — §e6 slots§f. + Metadata matching.
§b• Reinforced§f — §e9 slots§f. + NBT, Ore Dictionary, Mod Owner. Max stored item limit: §e64§f.
§b• Signalum§f — §e12 slots§f. Max stored: §e128§f.
§b• Resonant§f — §e15 slots§f. Max stored: §e320§f.

§6Additional Features (Reinforced and above)§f:
§b• Disable path-based over-sending§f to prevent items from looping through the network when no destination exists.
§b• Cap the total stored amount of an item in the connected block§f to prevent buffer overflow.

§eTip§f: Combine a filter with a §bServo§f on the same connection to both extract and restrict what is pulled.
